occurrence_sentence: BasejumpQDN™, the flagship software from evolutionQ, was part of a collaborative effort with Nokia and IDQuantique to enable Proximus, a Belgian telecommunications leader, to establish a quantum-safe optical network connection using quantum key distribution (QKD).

interaction_phrase: implements a layer of software abstraction called the Quantum Link Layer (QLL)
occurrence_sentence: BasejumpQDN implements a layer of software abstraction called the Quantum Link Layer (QLL) that allows the software to isolate any differences in QKD vendor's implementation and behavior. This also allows BasejumpQDN to support many different QKD vendors devices and take advantage of any optional items a vendor has implemented in the ETSI-014 implementation.
